text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has been chosen by the URA as
Umamusume of the Year, and her noble conduct
during the ceremony is a testament to her
worthiness to represent her generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober also takes notice of this and
becomes convinced that chasing after Air Groove
will help her build a new Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, I feel a strange sensation gripping my
chest... but I'm not sure why.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mejiro Bright fully immerses herself in
intense training for the spring Tenno Sho. Mejiro
Ryan is concerned by her fervency and has a chat
with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through their conversation, however, Mejiro
Ryan comes to understand how strong Mejiro
Bright's desire to live up to the Mejiro legacy is,
and she decides to cheer her on.
